category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to Chile market (occupational respiratory protective equipment under DS 594 framework, ISP certification, NCh/EN 149 standards).

title.en: China-to-Chile PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Chile's occupational respiratory protective equipment requirements: Instituto de Salud Publica (ISP) certification for occupational PPE, the DS 594 workplace hygiene and safety framework, INN/NCh standards adopting EN 149, and importer obligations. Note: respirators are occupational PPE regulated by ISP, not electrical products under SEC.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与智利职业呼吸防护设备要求对照，涵盖智利公共卫生研究所（ISP）对职业PPE的认证、DS 594职业卫生与安全框架、INN/NCh采纳EN 149的标准，以及进口商义务。注意：呼吸器属由ISP监管的职业PPE，并非SEC监管的电气产品。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與智利職業呼吸防護設備要求對照，涵蓋智利公共衛生研究所（ISP）對職業PPE的認證、DS 594職業衛生與安全框架、INN/NCh採納EN 149的標準，以及進口商義務。注意：呼吸器屬由ISP監管的職業PPE，並非SEC監管的電氣產品。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, ISP assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Chilean law, ISP certification scope, applicable NCh standards, and market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. Respirator classification (occupational PPE vs medical device) requires case-by-case analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、ISP评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行智利法律、ISP认证范围、适用NCh标准及市场监督实践。呼吸器分类（职业PPE与医疗器械）需要逐案分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、ISP評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行智利法律、ISP認證範圍、適用NCh標準及市場監督實踐。呼吸器分類（職業PPE與醫療器械）需要逐案分析。

answer_first.en: Occupational filtering respirators sold in Chile are regulated as personal protective equipment under the workplace health and safety framework (Decreto Supremo 594) and require certification by the Instituto de Salud Publica de Chile (ISP), which certifies occupational PPE — respirators are NOT electrical products under SEC. Chile's INN adopts ISO/EN standards as NCh, and EN 149 (FFP) is the commonly referenced performance standard. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports are not automatically accepted; ISP certification of the model is required. Chile does not operate an EU-style horizontal CE/Notified-Body regime — the route is ISP certification plus importer compliance.
answer_first.zh: 在智利销售的职业过滤式呼吸器作为个人防护设备，受职业健康与安全框架（最高法令594号，DS 594）监管，须经智利公共卫生研究所（ISP）认证——ISP负责认证职业PPE，呼吸器并非SEC监管的电气产品。智利国家标准局（INN）将ISO/EN标准采纳为NCh，EN 149（FFP）为常用引用的性能标准。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告不会自动被接受，须取得该型号的ISP认证。智利不实行欧盟式的横向CE/公告机构制度——路径为ISP认证加进口商合规。
answer_first.zht: 在智利銷售的職業過濾式呼吸器作為個人防護設備，受職業健康與安全框架（最高法令594號，DS 594）監管，須經智利公共衛生研究所（ISP）認證——ISP負責認證職業PPE，呼吸器並非SEC監管的電氣產品。智利國家標準局（INN）將ISO/EN標準採納為NCh，EN 149（FFP）為常用引用的性能標準。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告不會自動被接受，須取得該型號的ISP認證。智利不實行歐盟式的橫向CE/公告機構制度——路徑為ISP認證加進口商合規。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. Official regulator (ISP, INN, SUSESO, Ministerio de Salud) or primary legal source preferred; local PDFs are not accepted as primary sources.
